agent_output: {"escalations":[{"type":"contradiction","description":"MJ's architecture directly violates the established hexagonal architecture (ADR-002). MJ specifies that NotificationService will directly instantiate TwilioClient via `new TwilioClient(config.twilioAccountSid, config.twilioAuthToken)` in its constructor and call `this.twilio.messages.create()` directly. ADR-002 mandates that all external integrations are accessed via adapter interfaces (ports and adapters pattern). Direct instantiation of the Twilio SDK inside a domain/application service hard-couples it to Twilio, making it untestable without hitting the real API and impossible to swap providers — exactly what hexagonal architecture exists to prevent.","agents_involved":["MJ","ADR-002 (established architecture)"],"options":["Option A: Introduce an ISmsAdapter port (interface) in the application/domain layer. NotificationService depends on ISmsAdapter. A TwilioSmsAdapter implements ISmsAdapter and wraps the Twilio SDK. TwilioClient instantiation lives solely inside the adapter. This aligns with ADR-002 and keeps the domain clean.","Option B: MJ provides an explicit rationale for why this specific integration warrants an exception to ADR-002, and the team amends the ADR accordingly."],"recommendation":"Option A. The port/adapter boundary is load-bearing here: Bird's AC2 (SMS failure is non-blocking) requires the adapter to be independently testable so failure/retry behavior can be verified without calling Twilio. Direct coupling makes that acceptance criterion nearly impossible to test properly."}],"confidence":{"level":35,"high_confidence_areas":["Bird's domain rules and acceptance criteria are clear and internally consistent","The contradiction between MJ's design and ADR-002 is unambiguous"],"low_confidence_areas":["Whether MJ intentionally chose direct instantiation as a deliberate ADR exception or simply overlooked the constraint","Whether additional adapter concerns (retry policy, circuit breaker) should be specified at this stage"],"assumptions":["ADR-002 is still in effect and has not been superseded","Hexagonal architecture applies to all external integrations including SMS, not just a subset"]}}
